name: Carrying Fuck
descrip: Lift your opponent and fuck them silly. Requires the target to be restrained.
outcome: While holding up [TargetName]'s restrained form, [AttackerName] roughly thrusts up into [TargetHisOrHer] [SexAdjective][SexWord] at a rapid tempo, leaving the both of them moaning in pleasure as their hips slam together.
miss: While holding up [TargetName]'s restrained form, [AttackerName] roughly thrusts up into [TargetHisOrHer] [SexAdjective][SexWord] at a rapid tempo, but [TargetHeOrShe] seems unaffected!
statusOutcome: [TargetName]'s mind is left spinning in a sexual daze as you work to fuck them into an incoherent puddle of pleasure, every meeting of your hips leaving them whimpering in primal ecstasy.
